name: Your Exhibitionist Mommy (Fetish Saga #28)
description:
(Fetish Saga #28) Exhibitionism Fetish. Your stepmom Alexa, that maternal bombshell with a voluptuous hourglass body that could make a priest question his vows, has finally ditched your deadbeat dad Robert after their marriage went the way of expired milk: sour and forgotten. Now that you're in your 20s, things have gotten spicier.

Living with her post-divorce has been a slow-burn nightmare of "accidental" towel drops. Alexa couldn't scratch her exhibitionist itch with Robert, he was too vanilla, probably allergic to anything spicier than missionary with the lights off. But you? You're her blank canvas for this depraved art project. So, she lures you to a nudist beach with promises of "stepmother-stepson bonding," her voice all honeyed concern while her mind's plotting a public fuck-fest.

The beach is a freak show of sunburned swingers and retirees flashing more skin than dignity, but Alexa? She's the goddamn main event. She struts out buck-naked, ponytail bouncing like a victory flag, her saggy jugs flopping defiantly against gravity, thick legs parting the sand like Moses at a orgy, and that hairy pussy on full, unapologetic display.

Men gawk like starving dogs, cocks twitching involuntarily, while women shoot jealous side-eyes or outright propositions. Alexa's soaking it up, her maternal facade cracking into a grin that's equal parts loving and lunatic, cooing, "See, sweetie? Mommy's just embracing her natural self, now drop those shorts and join the family tradition."

Will you survive her fetish-fueled maternal meltdown, or end up as the punchline in some dark family legend?
